---
title: "Tools"
show-reading-time: false
---
```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700&family=PT+Sans:wght@400;700&display=swap');
body { font-family: 'PT Sans', sans-serif; }
h1, h2, h3, h4 { font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; }
</style>
```

A collection of small, privacy-friendly utilities that run entirely in your browser. No data is sent to any server.

## Available Tools

### [Pastebin](pastebin.qmd)
Real-time shared clipboard. Enter a room name, and anyone with the same name sees the same content, synced live across devices.

### [QR Code Generator](qr-code.qmd)
Generate QR codes for URLs, WiFi networks, contacts, emails, SMS, and phone numbers. Supports different sizes and error correction levels.

### [SVG Viewer](svg-viewer.qmd)
Paste or upload SVG code and see it rendered instantly. Useful for previewing diagrams and icons.

### [Function Grapher](graph.qmd)
Plot mathematical functions interactively. Supports standard math notation with zoom and pan controls.

### [Math Formula Generator](math-formula.qmd)
Type LaTeX, see it rendered live, then copy as a high-resolution PNG image, SVG, or in multiple formats (MathML for Office, Python/SymPy, Unicode for plain text). Includes a handwriting recognition pad for drawing formulas.

### [Fancy Text Generator](fancy-text.qmd)
Convert plain text into 20+ Unicode font styles (bold, italic, script, fraktur, double-struck, monospace, circled, and more). Click any style to copy. Works everywhere since the characters are real Unicode, not formatting.
